title: About
content:
About#Personal Summary#🔬 I am a software engineer and data science researcher interested in the following topics: machine learning, complex event processing, and Internet of Things.
🧸 I am particularly interested in the theory and praxis of the Web of Things and its related standards and protocols.
🧶 I have a variety of hobbies: baking, crocheting, numismatics, beer brewing, among others.
Profiles#You can find me here:
GitHub Kaggle Hackster
